[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0010010 2
1 1011111 6
2 0101010 3
3 1111110 6
4 1010001 3
5 1111001 5
6 1101111 6
7 0101110 4

01 10 1011011 5
12 21 0101110 4 match 7
23 32 1101111 6 match 6
34 43 1001001 3
45 54 1101111 6 match 6
56 65 1101111 6 match 6
67 76 0011110 4
70 07 1011111 6 match 1

02 20 1111111 a
13 31 1000011 3
24 42 0101111 5
35 53 1101111 6 match 6
46 64 0001111 4
57 75 1111111 a
60 06 1011111 6 match 1
71 17 0010110 3

61 16 0001110 3
